steps.title: Track the style contrast
steps.content: Realism is described as accurately representing ordinary working people, while romanticism is described as exaggerating beauty or heroism and hiding imperfection. The blank must show realism acting against those excesses.

steps.title: Choose the opposing action
steps.content: A would mean understand, B would mean promote, and D would mean emphasize. The needed verb means to work against or offset the excesses of romantic style. The answer is C.
